commands.review_summary:
This PR moves QQBot credential backup JSON imports from runtime reads into setup/doctor plugin-state migration, removes legacy cache imports, and adds startup preflight detection plus docs and tests.

PR surface: Source -112, Tests +62, Docs -1, Config +3. Total -48 across 19 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: the PR detector adds HOME/USERPROFILE as a QQBot credential-backup root even when active stateDir is different, and QQBot startup restores appId/clientSecret from the imported plugin KV backup. I did not execute the migration because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] A narrow automated repair can preserve the PR's runtime cleanup while removing the cross-root credential import and adding focused regression coverage.
